DropScript: 卡牌进入弃牌堆后执行

UseScript: local p = CS.ScriptExecutor.PlayerInfo; local key = "Defect_cardsample_defect_discharge"; local st = p.SkillTime; if st == nil then return end; if not st:ContainsKey(key) then st:set_Item(key, 0) end; local cd = st:get_Item(key); if cd > 0 then p.ShowCaption("技能冷却中"); return end; self:SetStatus("Self"); self:RunImmediately("Defect_buffsample_electric_orb", "EndRound"); self:RunImmediately("Defect_buffsample_ice_orb", "EndRound"); self:RunImmediately("Defect_buffsample_plasma_orb", "StartRound"); st:set_Item(key, 1);
local p = CS.ScriptExecutor.PlayerInfo; local count = math.floor(p.CardCount / 4); if count > 0 then self:SetStatus("Self"); self:ChangePower(tostring(count)); end

self:SetStatus("Target"); self:Damage("10"); local mgr = CS.FightCardManager.Instance; if mgr == nil or mgr.usedCardList == nil then return end; for i = 0, mgr.usedCardList.Count - 1 do local card = mgr.usedCardList:get_Item(i); if card ~= nil and card.data ~= nil then local expend = card.data:get_Item("Expend"); if expend == "0" then self:AddCard(card.data:get_Item("Id")); end end end
if self.Self.Defend <= 0 then self:SetStatus("Self"); self:ChangeDefence("11"); end

local function lv(id) local b = self.Self:GetBuff(id); if b == nil then return 0 end return b.buffConfig.Level end; local count = lv("Defect_buffsample_electric_orb") + lv("Defect_buffsample_ice_orb") + lv("Defect_buffsample_plasma_orb"); self:SetStatus("Target"); for i = 1, count do self:Damage("4"); end
